title: dryopteris flexuosa
intro: Dryopteris flexuosa, also known as flexible male fern, is a type of flowering plant in the fern family, native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Dryopteris flexuosa include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or extracting the plant's active compounds with a solvent.
